title: AM10_AM_Media
treatment_protocol_ch1: Mycobacterium tuberculosis H37Rv strain was used in infection experiments at a multiplicity of infection (MOI) 1:1 for 6 hours. Cells were lysed and preserved in TRIzol.
growth_protocol_ch1: Cyropreserved PBMCs were differentiated for 5 days in M-CSF and then CD14 negative column isolated to obtain MDMs. Fresh bronchoalveolar lavage samples were treated with streptomycin and penicillin, washed with HBSS to remove non-adherent cells, and rested overnight to obtain AMs. MDMs and AMs were cultured in RPMI/20% autologous serum.
extract_protocol_ch1: Samples were thawed, mixed with chloroform, and the aqueous layer plus 50% ethanol was processed using miRNeasy Mini Kit with DNA digestion by DNAse I.
extract_protocol_ch1.1: AM.MDM.Mtb libraries were prepared using Clontech SMARTer stranded v2 Pico Mammalian kit and sequenced on a NovaSeq6000 SP flow cell. MDM.IFN libraries were prepared usingNEBNext Ultra II Directional RNA Library Prep Kit and sequenced on a NovaSeq6000 S4 flow cell. AM.cryo libraries were prepared using Clontech SMARTer stranded v2 Pico Mammalian kit and sequenced on a NovaSeq6000 S1 flow cell.
data_processing: Sequence quality was assessed using FastQC, and sequencing adapters were removed using AdapterRemoval. Reads were aligned to the human genome (GRCh38) using STAR. Alignments were assessed with Picard and filtered to paired, non-PCR duplicate, primary alignments with mapping quality > 30 using samtools. Reads in genes were counted with Rsubread.
data_processing.2: Supplementary files format and content: Raw counts in genes. Comma delimited. Libraries are columns. Genes are rows labeled with their ENSEMBL gene ID
